DataExchangeHeaderReqInfo.first-line: The datasets you have requested from other organizations
DataExchangeHeaderReqInfo.second-line: Here you will find datasets that your organization has requested from other organizations.
DataExchangeHeaderReqInfo.link-text: Learn more about how you can request datasets

datasetDetails.previewFailedToLoad: Something went wrong. Please reload the page or try again later.

info.defaultdescription: Click information-icon to display detailed explanation of field.
info.repeatable: This is a repeatable property. You can {add} or {remove}.
info.suggestionText: You can generate suggestions based on the description you provided
info.searchVocabulary: Type in anything for a live search of the vocabulary

licenseAttributionByText.help: This property stores the mandatory naming text for licence details.
licenseAttributionByText.info: This property stores the mandatory naming text for licence details.
licenseAttributionByText.label: License attribution by text

licenseAttributionByTextTitle.help: Title of License attribution by text
licenseAttributionByTextTitle.info: Title of License attribution by text
licenseAttributionByTextTitle.label: Title

availabilityDisDE.help: Availability of the distribution of a dataset, as a selection from a fixed list of values via DCAT-AP URIs.
availabilityDisDE.info: Availability of the distribution of a dataset, as a selection from a fixed list of values via DCAT-AP URIs.
availabilityDisDE.label: Availability

accessServiceTitle.label: Data Service Title
accessServiceTitle.add-label: Add Data Service Title in another language
accessServiceTitle.help: The title of the data access service.
accessServiceTitle.info: The title of the data access service.

accessService.label: Data Service
accessService.info: This property refers to a data service that gives access to the distribution of the dataset.
accessService.help: A data service that gives access to the distribution of the dataset

accessServiceDescription.label: Data Service Description
accessServiceDescription.add-label: Add Data Service Description in another language
accessServiceDescription.help: A description of the data access service.
accessServiceDescription.info: This property contains a free-text account of the Distribution. This property can be repeated for parallel language versions of the description.

licence.info: This property refers to the license under which the Distribution is made available.
licence.label: License
licence.help: The license under which the Distribution is made available.

modified.info: This property contains the most recent date on which the Distribution was changed or modified.
modified.help: Date on which the Distribution was changed or modified.
modified.label: Modified

issued.label: Issued
issued.info: This property contains the date of formal issuance (e.g., publication) of the Distribution.
issued.help: The date of formal issuance (e.g., publication) of the Distribution.

format.label: Format
format.info: This property refers to the file format of the Distribution.
format.help: The file format of the Distribution.

downloadUrl.label: Download Url
downloadUrl.info: This property contains a URL that is a direct link to a downloadable file in a given format.
downloadUrl.help: Direct link to a downloadable file in a given format.

description.label: Description
description.info: This property contains a free-text account of the Distribution.
description.help: This property contains a free-text account of the Distribution.

title.label: Title
title.info: This property contains a name given to the Distribution. This property can be repeated for parallel language versions of the description.
title.help: This property contains a name given to the Distribution.

accessUrl.label: Access Url
accessUrl.info: This property contains a URL that gives access to a Distribution of the Dataset. The resource at the access URL may contain information about how to get the Dataset.
accessUrl.help: This property contains a URL that gives access to a Distribution of the Dataset.

spatialResolutionInMeters.label: Spatial Resolution In Meters
spatialResolutionInMeters.placeholder: Distribution Spatial Resolution In Meters placeholder text
spatialResolutionInMeters.info: This property refers to the minimum spatial separation resolvable in a dataset, measured in meters.
spatialResolutionInMeters.help: Minimum spatial separation resolvable in a dataset.

temporalResolutionSecond.placeholder: Dataset Temporal Resolution Second placeholder text
temporalResolutionSecond.label: Second

temporalResolutionHour.label: Hour
temporalResolutionHour.placeholder: Dataset Temporal Resolution Hour placeholder text

temporalResolutionMinute.placeholder: Dataset Temporal Resolution Minute placeholder text
temporalResolutionMinute.label: Minute

temporalResolutionMonth.label: Month
temporalResolutionMonth.placeholder: Dataset Temporal Resolution Month placeholder text
temporalResolutionMonth.help: The month of the temporal resolution.

temporalResolutionYear.label: Year
temporalResolutionYear.placeholder: Dataset Temporal Resolution Year placeholder text

temporalResolutionDay.label: Day
temporalResolutionDay.placeholder: Dataset Temporal Resolution Day placeholder text
temporalResolutionDay.help: The day of the temporal resolution

temporalResolution.label: Temporal Resolution
temporalResolution.info: This property refers to the minimum time period resolvable in the dataset distribution.
temporalResolution.help: The minimum time period resolvable in the dataset distribution.

status.label: Status
status.info: The status of the distribution in the context of maturity lifecycle. It MUST take one of the values Completed, Deprecated, Under Development, Withdrawn.
status.help: The status of the distribution in the context of maturity lifecycle.

language.info: This property refers to a language used in the Distribution. This property can be repeated if the metadata is provided in multiple languages.
language.help: A language used in the Distribution.
language.label: Language

packageFormat.label: Package Format
packageFormat.info: This property refers to the format of the file in which one or more data files are grouped together, e.g. to enable a set of related files to be downloaded together. It SHOULD be expressed using a media type as defined in the official register of media types managed by IANA.
packageFormat.help: The format of the file in which one or more data files are grouped together.

compressFormat.label: Compress Format
compressFormat.info: This property refers to the format of the file in which the data is contained in a compressed form, e.g. to reduce the size of the downloadable file. It SHOULD be expressed using a media type as defined in the official register of media types managed by IANA.
compressFormat.help: The format of the file in which the data is contained in a compressed form.

checksum.label: Checksum
checksum.info: This property provides a mechanism that can be used to verify that the contents of a distribution have not changed. The checksum is related to the downloadURL.
checksum.help: The checksum is related to the downloadURL.

mediaType.label: Media Type
mediaType.info: This property refers to the format of the file in which the data is contained in a compressed form, e.g. to reduce the size of the downloadable file. It SHOULD be expressed using a media type as defined in the official
mediaType.help: The format of the file in which the data is contained in a compressed form.

availability.label: Availability
availability.info: How long it is planned to keep the Distribution of the Dataset available.
availability.help: How long it is planned to keep the Distribution of the Dataset available.

byteSize.label: Byte Size
byteSize.info: This property contains the size of a Distribution in bytes.
byteSize.help: The size of a Distribution in bytes.

type.info: This property refers to the media type of the Distribution as defined in the official register of media types managed by IANA.
type.help: The media type of the Distribution.
type.label: Type

accessServiceEndpointURL.label: Data Service Endpoint URL
accessServiceEndpointURL.help: The link to the data service's webpage.
accessServiceEndpointURL.info: The link to the data service's webpage.

rights.info: This property refers to a statement that specifies rights associated with the Distribution.
rights.help: This property refers to a statement that specifies rights associated with the Distribution.
rights.label: Rights

rightsUrl.label: Rights Url
rightsUrl.help: A link to the rights definition
rightsUrl.info: A link to the rights definition

rightsString.label: Rights Statement
rightsString.help: A statement describing the rights associated with the distribuion

conformsTo.label: Conforms To
conformsTo.info: This property refers to an established schema to which the described Distribution conforms.
conformsTo.help: An established schema to which the described Distribution conforms.

conformsToTitle.label: Title
conformsToTitle.placeholder: Distribution Conforms To Title placeholder text

hasPolicy.label: Has Policy
hasPolicy.info: This property refers to the policy expressing the rights associated with the distribution if using the ODRL vocabulary

hasPolicyUrl.label: Url
hasPolicyUrl.info: This property refers to the policy expressing the rights associated with the distribution if using the ODRL vocabulary

pageUrl.label: Url
pageUrl.placeholder: The Url to the distribution page
pageUrl.help: The link to the webpage of the page.
pageUrl.info: The link to the webpage of the page.

page.info: This property refers to a page or document about this Distribution.
page.help: A page or document about this Distribution.
page.label: Page

pageTitle.label: Page title
pageTitle.help: A descriptive title for the page

descriptionLanguage.label: Language
descriptionLanguage.info: This property refers to a language used in the description of the distribution. This property can be repeated if the metadata is provided in multiple languages.
descriptionLanguage.help: The language the description of the distribution is in

registerADoi.message: Are you sure you want to register a DOI? This can not be reverted.

markAsDraft.message: Are you sure you want to mark this dataset as draft?

datasetDeletion.message: Are you sure you want to delete this dataset? This can not be reverted.
